design_system.name: Totpay Midnight Gold
design_system.description: A high-contrast, mobile-first betting utility design system optimized for Telegram Mini Apps in Uzbekistan.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FACC15] text-[#020617] hover:bg-[#EAB308] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(250,204,21,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1E293B] text-white hover:bg-[#334155] border border-slate-700 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.default: bg-[#0F172A] border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-lg relative overflow-hidden
cards.highlight: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0F172A] to-[#1E293B] border border-[#FACC15]/20 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#FACC15]/40 transition-colors
cards.glass: bg-[#0F172A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5

inputs.default: bg-[#020617] border border-slate-700 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-[#FACC15] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FACC15] rounded-xl h-12 px-4 transition-all
inputs.large: text-2xl font-bold bg-transparent border-b-2 border-slate-700 focus:border-[#FACC15] rounded-none px-0 h-16 text-center placeholder:text-slate-600

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#020617]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-800 pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.nav_item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 hover:text-[#FACC15] transition-colors data-[active=true]:text-[#FACC15]

dashboard.hero: col-span-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FACC15] to-[#EAB308] text-[#020617] rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

admin_panel.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-slate-800 p-4 hidden md:flex flex-col gap-2

general: Implement a 'Mobile-First' approach. The app is primarily a Telegram Mini App.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give a sporty, betting-app feel.
Use 'Manrope' for body text for maximum legibility on small screens.
Ensure all touch targets are at least 44x44px.
Use the 'Midnight Gold' theme: Deep Navy background (#020617) with Bright Yellow (#FACC15) accents.
Do NOT use gradients for the main background. Use solid #020617 to prevent banding on low-end screens.

specific_flows.dashboard: Create a 'Bento' style grid. The User Balance should be the most prominent element (Hero). Quick actions (Deposit, Withdraw) should be immediately accessible.
specific_flows.deposit: Use a step-by-step wizard or a clean form. Highlight the selected currency (UZS/USD/RUB).
specific_flows.withdraw: Emphasize safety. Use a saved wallet list with clear logos (Uzcard/Humo).
specific_flows.admin: Dense data display. Use a table component for transactions. Add filters for 'Pending', 'Approved', 'Rejected'.

animations.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
animations.list_item: initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} transition={{ staggerChildren: 0.1 }}

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly, mainly for overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
